name: @intentsolutionsio/test-coverage-analyzer
description: Analyze code coverage metrics, identify untested code, and generate comprehensive coverage reports

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install test-coverage-analyzer\\n  or /plugin install test-coverage-analyzer@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
